topic: A yellow New York City taxi driving through Times Square, street-level view.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: street-level front view of a yellow NYC taxi entering Times Square.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: side-angle tracking along the taxi as it glides past neon billboards.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: low-angle rear view of the taxi moving forward with flashing Times Square lights in the background.
parsed_generation.narration: A yellow NYC taxi cruises through Times Square, captured from front, side, and rear angles, creating a concise eight-second street-level drive through the neon glow.

feedback:
Compared to the gold standard, the output captures the taxi in Times Square but diverges in timestamp rhythm and shot order. The gold standard begins with a wide establishing shot of neon Times Square, followed by a street-level pass; this version uses shorter, uneven segments and introduces a rear low-angle. To improve alignment, adopt the two 4-second segments with a leading wide shot and emphasize neon reflections and precise tracking through the frame.
